sectiondef.header: Register offsets for the CAN. Each register is 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Data Phase Baud Rate Prescalar Register.
Tx Buffer Ready Request Served Interrupt Enable Register.
Tx Buffer Cancel Request Served Interrupt Enable Register.
Rx Buffer Control Status Register Host Control Bit Mask.
Rx Buffer Full Interrupt Enable Register.
Rx Buffer Full Interrupt Enable Register.

description.para: Tx Message Buffer Element Start Address - 0x0100 (2304 Bytes) End Address - 0x09FF

briefdescription.para: Tx Message Buffer Element 0 ID Register.
Tx Message Buffer Element 0 DLC Register.
Tx Message Buffer Element 0 DW Register.
Tx Event Message Buffer Element 0 ID Register.
Tx Event Message Buffer Element 0 DLC Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element ID Registers.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element 0 ID Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element DLC Registers.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element 0 DLC Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element DW Registers.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element 0 DW Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element FIFO 1 ID Registers.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element 0 ID Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element FIFO 1 DLC Registers.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element 0 DLC Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element FIFO 1 SW Registers.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element 0 DW Register.

sectiondef.header: Rx Message Buffer Element ID,DLC,DW Sizes.

briefdescription.para: Rx Message Buffer Element Next ID AT Offset.
Rx Message Buffer Element Next DLC AT Offset.
Rx Message Buffer Element Next DW AT Offset.
Rx Buffer index for Overflow (Mailbox Mode)
Rx Buffer index for Last Received Message (Mailbox Mode)
Rx Match Not Finished Intr Mask.
Rx Buffer Overflow interrupt Mask (Mailbox mode)
Rx Buffer Full Interrupt Mask (Mailbox mode)
Tx Cancellation Request Served Interrupt Mask.
Tx Buffer Ready Request Served Interrupt Mask.
Rx Watermark Full interrupt Mask (FIFO mode)
Rx Watermark Full interrupt Mask for FIFO 1.
TX Event FIFO Watermark Full Intr Mask.

memberdef.name: XCANFD_IXR_ALL
memberdef.initializer: (XCANFD_IXR_PEE_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_BSRD_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXMNF_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXBOFLW_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXRBF_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_TXCRS_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_TXRRS_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXFWMFLL_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_WKUP_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_SLP_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_BSOFF_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_ERROR_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXFOFLW_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXOK_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_TXOK_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_ARBLST_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_TSCNT_OFLW_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXFOFLW_1_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_RXFWMFLL_1_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_TXEOFLW_MASK | \ XCANFD_IXR_TXEWMFLL_MASK)

sectiondef.header: CAN Frame Identifier (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX/Acceptance Filter
CAN Frame Data Length Code (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)

briefdescription.para: TX Event FIFO Status Register Offset.
TX Event FIFO Read Index Mask.
TX Event FIFO Increment Read Index Mask.
TX Event FIFO Fill Level Mask.
TX Event FIFO Fill Level Shift.
TX Event FIFO Increment Read Index SHIFT.

sectiondef.header: CAN TxBuffer Ready Request Served Interrupt Enable Register Masks

briefdescription.para: TxBuffer Ready Request Mask for ALL

sectiondef.header: CAN TxBuffer Cancel Request Served Interrupt Enable Register Masks

briefdescription.para: TxBuffer Cancel Request Mask for ALL.
Maximum CAN frame length in bytes.
This macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: u32 XCanFd_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset);

briefdescription.para: This macro writes the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: u32 XCanFd_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data);
